## Description

A concise summary of the changes introduced in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation / Configuration update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines (`.editorconfig`, `.prettierrc`, `cspell.json`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] All new and existing CI/CD checks pass cleanly.
